anyhow::Result std::collections::HashSet std::fs std::path::{Path, PathBuf} walkdir::WalkDir
pub const IGNORED_DIRS: &[&str] = &[ "node_modules", ".git", "target", "dist", "vendor", ".next", "build", "out", ".env", "__pycache__", ".venv", "venv", ".idea", ".vscode", "coverage", ".nuxt", ]; // ... pub const NOISE_LOCK_FILES: &[&str] = &[ // JavaScript ecosystem "package-lock.json", "yarn.lock", "pnpm-lock.yaml", "bun.lockb", // Rust "Cargo.lock", // Python "poetry.lock", "Pipfile.lock", // Ruby "Gemfile.lock", // PHP "composer.lock", // .NET "packages.lock.json", // Go "go.sum", ]; // ... pub const NOISE_LOG_EXTENSIONS: &[&str] = &["log"]; // ... pub const NOISE_MAP_EXTENSIONS: &[&str] = &["map"]; // ... pub const NOISE_MINIFIED_JS_SUFFIX: &str = ".min.js"; // ... pub const NOISE_MINIFIED_CSS_SUFFIX: &str = ".min.css"; // ... pub const NOISE_BINARY_EXTENSIONS: &[&str] = &["png", "jpg", "jpeg", "ico", "gif", "webp", "bmp"]; // ... pub const NOISE_DIRS: &[&str] = &["dist", "build", ".next", "out", "target"]; // ... pub const SVG_SIZE_THRESHOLD: u64 = 2048; // ... pub struct IgnoredFile { // ... pub enum NoiseReason { // ... pub fn description(&self) -> String // ... pub struct ScanResult { // ... pub const IGNORED_FILES: &[&str] = &[ // System ".DS_Store", // Secrets & credentials ".env", ".env.local", ".env.production", ".env.development", "id_rsa", "id_rsa.pub", "id_ed25519", "id_ed25519.pub", "id_dsa", "*.pem", "*.key", "*.p12", "*.pfx", "secrets.yaml", "secrets.yml", "secrets.json", ".npmrc", ".pypirc", "credentials", "credentials.json", "service-account.json", // Output files "context.xml", "context.json", "context.md", "navigator_map.xml", "navigator_map.md", "navigator_map.json", ".navigator_memory.json", // Nyx.Navigator runtime state files ".navigator_cache.json", ".navigator_watch_state.json", ".navigator_history.json", ]; // ... pub const BLOCKED_EXTENSIONS: &[&str] = &["pem", "key", "p12", "pfx", "jks", "keystore"]; // ... pub const BLOCKED_PATTERNS: &[&str] = &[ "id_rsa", "id_dsa", "id_ed25519", "id_ecdsa", "aws_access", "aws_secret", "credentials", ]; // ... pub struct NavigatorIgnorePattern { // ... fn parse(line: &str) -> Option<Self> // ... fn matches(&self, rel_path: &str) -> bool // ... pub fn load_navigator_ignore(root: &Path) -> Vec<NavigatorIgnorePattern> // ... pub fn load_gitignore(root: &Path) -> Vec<NavigatorIgnorePattern> // ... pub const SOURCE_EXTENSIONS: &[&str] = &[ "rs", "py", "js", "mjs", "cjs", "ts", "tsx", "jsx", "go", "java", "kt", "kts", "swift", "c", "cc", "cpp", "cxx", "h", "hpp", "cs", "rb", "php", "scala", "clj", "cljs", "elm", "hs", "ml", "mli", "ex", "exs", "lua", "r", "dart", "vue", "svelte", "zig", "nim", "cr", ]; pub enum WebhookEvent { // ... pub fn as_str(&self) -> &str // ... pub struct Webhook { // ... pub fn new(url: String, events: Vec<WebhookEvent>) -> Self // ... pub struct WebhookPayload { // ... pub enum WebhookData { // ... pub struct GraphUpdatedData { // ... pub struct ModuleChangedData { // ... pub struct DependenciesChangedData { // ... pub struct WebhookService { // ... pub struct WebhookDelivery { // ... pub enum WebhookDeliveryStatus { // ... pub fn new() -> Self // ... pub fn register_webhook( &self, url: String, events: Vec<WebhookEvent>, ) -> Result<Webhook, String> // ... pub fn unregister_webhook(&self, webhook_id: &str) -> Result<(), String> // ... pub fn list_webhooks(&self) -> Result<Vec<Webhook>, String> // ... pub fn get_webhook(&self, webhook_id: &str) -> Result<Webhook, String> // ... pub fn enable_webhook(&self, webhook_id: &str) -> Result<(), String> // ... pub fn disable_webhook(&self, webhook_id: &str) -> Result<(), String> // ... pub fn notify_graph_updated( &self, total_files: usize, total_edges: usize, affected_modules: Vec<String>, ) -> Vec<Result<(), String>> // ... pub fn notify_module_changed( &self, module_id: String, path: String, change_type: &str, signature_count: usize, risk_level: Option<String>, is_bridge: Option<bool>, ) -> Vec<Result<(), String>> // ... pub fn notify_dependencies_changed( &self, module_id: String, added: Vec<String>, removed: Vec<String>, ) -> Vec<Result<(), String>> // ... fn notify(&self, event: WebhookEvent, data: WebhookData) -> Vec<Result<(), String>> // ... fn deliver_webhook(&self, webhook: &Webhook, payload: &str) -> Result<(), String> // ... pub fn get_delivery_history( &self, limit: Option<usize>, ) -> Result<Vec<WebhookDelivery>, String> // ... pub fn test_webhook(&self, webhook_id: &str) -> Result<String, String> // ... mod tests // ... fn test_webhook_creation() // ... fn test_webhook_events() // ...
